action.reasoning: Observation: Test accuracy 0.711 (best so far) with ResNet50 + cleanlab cleaning. Val accuracy plateaued at 78.7% but test gap indicates overfitting or poor cleaning. Analysis: 1) OOF used only 5 epochs per fold, insufficient for good probability estimates. 2) ResNet50 may not be the best backbone for noisy-label robustness. 3) No mixup augmentation, leading to overfitting. Decision: Upgrade to ConvNeXt Tiny backbone, increase OOF epochs to 10, add mixup (alpha=0.2) during final training, use SWA for better generalization, filter noisy labels more conservatively (keep samples with label_quality≥0.5 and cleanlab issues=False), train for 50 epochs. Submit eval after training to measure improvement.
